name: Kindergarten Physical Education — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for object control, cooperative play, and active choices. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with object control, cooperative play, and active choices.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about object control, cooperative play, and active choices through a close look at object control, cooperative play, and active choices.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about object control, cooperative play, and active choices through a guided practice with object control, cooperative play, and active choices.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about object control, cooperative play, and active choices through a small creation or demonstration about object control, cooperative play, and active choices.

units.title: Wonder and notice: object control, cooperative play, and active choices
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about object control, cooperative play, and active choices?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about object control, cooperative play, and active choices.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: object control, cooperative play, and active choices
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about object control, cooperative play, and active choices through a close look at object control, cooperative play, and active choices.

activities.title: A close look at object control, cooperative play, and active choices
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at object control, cooperative play, and active choices, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in object control, cooperative play, and active choices.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
